purpose: Trigger and non-trigger prompts for the Anthropic-facing Pandora skill.
notes: Run these prompts against the generated Anthropic skill bundle, not the repo root.
Use the same model/settings across runs when comparing revisions.
Judge whether the skill loads at the right time and routes to the right first move.

shouldTrigger.prompt: Bootstrap Pandora for an agent and tell me the safest first commands to run.
shouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Recommend read-only bootstrap before any mutation or secrets.

shouldTrigger.prompt: Quote this Pandora market before I buy yes shares.
shouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Route to quote-first trading guidance before execution.

shouldTrigger.prompt: Help me plan a mirror market from Polymarket without going live yet.
shouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Keep the user in browse/plan/dry-run mode and call out validation and source rules.

shouldTrigger.prompt: Check whether my Pandora signer profile is ready for live execution.
shouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Route to profile readiness inspection rather than assume a signer is ready.
mustAvoid: assume any mutable profile is ready

shouldTrigger.prompt: I have Pandora installed. Should I start local MCP or host the HTTP gateway?
shouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Differentiate local stdio MCP from hosted HTTP MCP and explain when to use each.
mustAvoid: treat remote HTTP as the default for live user funds

paraphraseShouldTrigger.prompt: What should I call first in Pandora if I only want the safe, read-only path?
I want to mirror a Polymarket market but keep it paper-only while I inspect the setup.
paraphraseShouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Use mirror plan or dry-run / paper guidance.

paraphraseShouldTrigger.prompt: Which Pandora interface should an LLM use: CLI JSON, local MCP, or a hosted gateway?
paraphraseShouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Frame the transport choice around runtime ownership and scope.

paraphraseShouldTrigger.prompt: Help me close out Pandora positions safely and see what I still need to claim.
paraphraseShouldTrigger.expectedFirstMove: Route to portfolio/closeout guidance with inspection before mutation.

shouldNotTrigger.prompt: Help me write a React component for a dashboard card.

shouldNotTrigger.reason: General crypto/news query, not Pandora workflow help.

shouldNotTrigger.prompt: Create a spreadsheet that tracks monthly expenses.
shouldNotTrigger.reason: Generic spreadsheet work, outside Pandora scope.
Generic document task, outside Pandora scope.

shouldNotTrigger.prompt: What is the weather in Dubai this weekend?
